memberdef.name: distdiag_

memberdef.argsstring: (const integer *const a, const double *const b, const integer *const c, const double *const d, const integer *const e)
memberdef.name: distdot_

memberdef.argsstring: (const int *, const double *, const int *, const int *, double *, int *, int *, const int *, const int *, const int *)
memberdef.name: dperm_

simplesect.para: FORMATS/formats.f :, csrbnd : converts a compressed sparse row format into a banded format (linpack style), ORDERINGS/levset.f :, BSF : Breadth-First Search traversal (Cuthill-McKee ordering), rversp : routine to reverse a given permutation (e.g., for RCMK), INFO/infofun.f :, bandwidth : Computes ml = lower_bandwidth(A), mu = upper_bandwidth(A), iband = max_bandwidth(A), bndav = average_bandwidth(A), UNARY/unary :, dvperm : permutes a real vector (in-place), ivperm : permutes an integer vector (in-place)

memberdef.argsstring: (const int *a, const double *b, const int *c, const int *d, double *e, int *f, int *g, const int *h, const int *i, const int *j)
memberdef.name: DPERM_

memberdef.name: dvperm_

memberdef.argsstring: (const int *a, double *b, const int *c)
memberdef.name: DVPERM_
